title: pelargonium × lima
intro: Pelargonium × lima, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium Roseum, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have a range of health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and relieving symptoms of menopause. The leaves and flowers of the plant are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being. Regular consumption of Pelargonium × lima herbal preparations has been associated with improved mood, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced digestion.
